final:
// // This module checks if three 8-bit inputs, A, B, and C, are in descending order.
module top_module(
    input [7:0] A,
    input [7:0] B,
    input [7:0] C,
    output reg Y
);always @(*) begin
    if(A < B && B < C) begin
        Y = 1;
    end else begin
        Y = 0;
    end
end

endmodule
